method: Rendered the rebuilt 22-page PDF with pdftoppm at 120 DPI after tightening scope language for the Marchenko-Pastur visibility reference, low-rank/stable-rank interpretation, same-base audit scope, and objective/content contrast. Verified pdfinfo reports 22 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus the edited spectral, related-work, and discussion pages at full size. Citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible and no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
